title: Distant Create
description: My personal modpack that I wanted just to share with people. Includes 6.0 Create with some of its addons and changed world generation via Tectonic plus Distant Horizons to be fully able to experience the Tectonic terrain.
body:
My personal modpack, uploaded on Modrinth.
Includes 6.0 Create with some of its addons, performance mods and combo of Tectonic + Distant Horizons to fully experience its incredible terrain.
